title: The Missing Hot Sauce
primaryEvent: Open on the empty stall and Dorothy's 'just in case' bottle — the loss that makes the mystery personal, and the theme that a community protects its own.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m1_01_the_missing_hot_sauce.md

title: The First Supper
primaryEvent: Serve the soup — the group tastes what's at stake, and Hank's disappearance stops being Emma's alone.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m1_02_the_first_supper.md

title: A Simmering Suspicion
primaryEvent: Marcus's 'man running from something' is the catalyst — it turns dinner-party curiosity into a real question.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m1_03_a_simmering_suspicion.md

title: Stirring the Pot
primaryEvent: The theory competition — every character's frame is characterization and misdirection; Emma's joke is the truth no one takes seriously.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m1_04_stirring_the_pot.md

title: Mise en Place
primaryEvent: The club commits to investigating and reconvening with a potluck — assignments drawn — turning a dinner into a case.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m1_05_mise_en_place.md

title: A Fine Sieve
primaryEvent: Oliver's methodical library dig turns idle theory into a documented lead — the case breaks into Act 2.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_06_a_fine_sieve.md

title: Gathering the Ingredients
primaryEvent: Olivia works Marcus for texture and pulls the LLC out of Oliver at home — surfacing what he'd keep to himself.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_07_gathering_the_ingredients.md

title: The Bottom Line
primaryEvent: Elijah quietly makes the LLC the group's problem and starts modeling the money — the case gains a spine.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_08_the_bottom_line.md

title: A Pinch Too Much
primaryEvent: Noah converts the analog dead-end into a data trail — the patents show what the scheme is actually for.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_09_a_pinch_too_much.md

title: Loose Lips
primaryEvent: Jasper's need to contribute causes the breach — the call that quietly turns the developer's attention on the group.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_10_loose_lips.md

title: The Empty Stall
primaryEvent: The empty Saturday stall plus the Paolo precedent turn one disappearance into a pattern — someone is doing this on purpose.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_11_the_empty_stall.md

title: Coming to a Boil
primaryEvent: The potluck 'solves' the case — false victory — while the seeds of the reversal (Dorothy's brisk stranger, Jasper's unseen warning) sit in plain sight.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_12_coming_to_a_boil.md

title: Service for One
primaryEvent: Bring the threat home and put a face on it. The pressure is economic and personal, not an exposed secret. Pike reveals himself with a charm that reads as menace.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m3_13_service_for_one.md

title: The Seamless Supper
primaryEvent: Emergency dinner rallies the group around the C&D; privately, Emma finally lets Olivia see how precarious things really are.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m3_14_the_seamless_supper.md

title: A Bitter Taste
beat: All Is Lost (part 2) / Dark Night of the Soul
primaryEvent: Noah traces the breach to Jasper; the group's sharpest fight — then Oliver stands up and turns despair into a plan.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m3_15_a_bitter_taste.md

title: The Recipe for Revenge
primaryEvent: The swarm plan and roles come together; Jasper quietly takes the find-Hank mission and leaves.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m3_16_the_recipe_for_revenge.md

title: Sharpening the Knives
primaryEvent: Alone-but-connected, each member builds their piece of the campaign; Jasper quietly pockets Dorothy's bottle for the road.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m3_17_sharpening_the_knives.md

title: Turning Up the Heat
primaryEvent: The coordinated campaign launches and hope builds — the club acts as one team instead of six investigators.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_18_turning_up_the_heat.md

title: The Ridgeline Diner
primaryEvent: From the road: Jasper's first night of dead-end calls — he keeps going anyway; the loneliness under the performance surfaces alone.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_19_the_diner.md

title: Ghost Kitchen
primaryEvent: The counterattack lands — a glib commentator, blog takedowns, and a close call with a traced account leave the group doubting they've made things worse.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_20_ghost_kitchen.md

title: The Starlite Drive-In
primaryEvent: From the road: Noah's pruned spreadsheet narrows the search and a seed supplier names a collective 'out past the city' — the first real lead.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_21_the_drive_in.md

title: Murph's
beat: Finale (from the road — the low point)
primaryEvent: From the road: the low point — Jasper nearly drives home, then a bartender names Meadowlight and the door cracks open.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_22_the_dive.md

title: Farm to Table
primaryEvent: Jasper finds Hank in the Meadowlight greenhouse and shows him the bottle — his quiet, un-performed redemption, and Hank agrees to come home.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_23_farm_to_table.md

title: The Proof
primaryEvent: Oliver's sourced rebuttal arms a hundred small voices; a food critic adopts the framing, sentiment flips, investors pull, and the C&D is withdrawn.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_24_the_proof.md

title: Family Meal
primaryEvent: Family Meal — Hank returns with Jasper, the bottle's arc closes, the economic squeeze lifts, and the club commits to continuing with rotating hosts.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_25_family_meal.md
